1.10.10:
## Improvements based on recent feedback

This release combines the user-facing improvements from the last two updates so they are documented in one place.

- Saved pages and favorites now load from the local warm cache first and refresh in place, so the drawer feels faster and more stable.
- The default feed now checks whether anything changed before reloading and only inserts newer items when the server has something new.
- Collection cards in the sidebar are now clickable across the full card, matching the saved item cards.
- The saved pages drawer and collection browsing flow were refined to better match how people are actually using the extension.
